title: keteleeria fortunei
intro: Keteleeria fortunei, also known as the Chinese fir, is a species of evergreen tree native to China. This tree has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The extracts and oils derived from the Keteleeria fortunei plant have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts can also be found in topical creams and ointments.
